data.title: Alaska Air Takes Off with 'Accelerate Plan': $10 EPS Target By 2027
data.description: Alaska Air shares are trading higher following the company's robust financial outlook for fiscal year 2025. Alaska Air expects strong performance, projecting earnings per share of at least $5.75, surpassing the $5.44 estimate, with capital expenditures ranging from $1.4 billion to $1.5 billion.

data.title: Looking At Alibaba Gr Hldgs's Recent Unusual Options Activity
Looking At Blackstone's Recent Unusual Options Activity
Trump's Return Threatens Billions in US Chip Investment from Taiwan, Samsung
data.description: Semiconductor giants investing billions in US due to subsidies under Chips Act, but Trump's return may jeopardize future deals, causing industry concerns.

data.title: Oracle Shares Down After Mixed Q2 Results Spark Analyst Caution, 'Guidance Fell Below Consensus'
data.description: Shares of Oracle Corp. drop after downbeat earnings. Analysts show mixed views. RPO growth is solid, but Q3 guidance is below expectations.
